claims.evidence_text: Sowing was performed at a seeding rate of 350 germinable seeds m−2 .
claims.claim_summary: Organic durum wheat sown at a seeding rate of 350 germinable seeds per m2.
claims.cultivar: Old Saragolla, Cappelli, Marco Aurelio, Nadif

claims.evidence_text: The sowing dates were 1st December (2018) and 24thPage 3 of 11 Carucci etal.Agriculture&FoodSecurity (2023)12:12 November (2019).
claims.claim_summary: Durum wheat sown in late November to early December in southern Italy (Mediterranean).

claims.evidence_text: CTR, plus 45 kg ­ha−1 of foliar N applied at heading (BBCH 51, CTR+N)
claims.claim_summary: Foliar nitrogen (45 kg/ha) applied at heading (BBCH 51) in organic durum wheat.

claims.evidence_text: CTR, plus 45 kg ­ha−1 of foliar S applied at flag leaf stage (BBCH 47, CTR+S)
claims.claim_summary: Foliar sulfur applied at 45 kg/ha at flag leaf stage (BBCH 47) in organic durum wheat.

claims.evidence_text: control (CTR), where 50 kg ­ ha−1 of dry blood meal was applied at sowing
claims.claim_summary: Base organic nitrogen applied as 50 kg/ha of dry blood meal at sowing in organic durum wheat.

claims.evidence_text: At full maturity (11% humidity, on 29 and 18 June in 2018 and 2019), the crop was machine-harvested, and the yield was evaluated.
claims.claim_summary: Durum wheat machine-harvested at full maturity at 11% grain humidity.
Organic durum wheat grain protein concentration ranged from about 10.1% to 11.7% across varieties, seasons and Selenium treatments.
claims.cultivar: Cappelli, Marco Aurelio, Old Saragolla, Nadif

claims.evidence_text: At physiological maturity (BBCH stage 87), on 0.5 linear meters, plants were taken in two adjacent rows
claims.claim_summary: Durum wheat physiological maturity occurs at BBCH stage 87.
